1361.chinese_text: 天哪，一杯冰凉的可乐！正是夏日最棒的解渴良药！
1361.english_text: Heavens, an ice-cold cola! The ultimate summer thirst-quencher!

1362.chinese_text: 看起来好好喝……那黑褐色的液体在杯中荡漾，泡沫还在嘶嘶作响！
1362.english_text: It looks delicious... the dark brown liquid ripples in the glass, and the bubbles are still fizzing!

1363.chinese_text: 不管是吃火锅、烧烤还是汉堡，一杯可乐都是绝佳的搭配！
1363.english_text: Whether it's hot pot, BBQ, or burgers, a cola is the perfect match!

1364.chinese_text: 听着那气泡在舌尖炸裂的声音，简直太满足了！
1364.english_text: Listening to the sound of bubbles bursting on the tip of my tongue is pure bliss!

1365.chinese_text: 这款可乐的包装设计太经典了，那醒目的红色Logo让人一眼就能认出来！
1365.english_text: The packaging is so classic; that striking red logo is instantly recognizable!

1366.chinese_text: 我记得小时候每次喝到可乐都像是在过节一样开心！
1366.english_text: I remember as a kid, every sip of cola felt like a holiday celebration!

1367.chinese_text: 天哪，我怎么能错过这杯加了冰块的可乐？它在向我招手呢！
1367.english_text: Gosh, how could I miss this iced cola? It’s practically waving at me!

1368.chinese_text: 说实话，虽然它不那么健康，但我真的无法抗拒它的诱惑……
1368.english_text: To be honest, even though it's not healthy, I really can't resist the temptation...

1369.chinese_text: 这款可乐的味道总是那么纯正，不管喝多少次都不会腻！
1369.english_text: This cola always tastes so authentic; I never get tired of it!

1370.chinese_text: 看着杯子里冒出的气泡，我的心情也跟着变得欢快起来了！
1370.english_text: Watching the bubbles rise in the glass makes my mood brighten up too!

1371.chinese_text: 喝下一大口可乐，让那股冰凉的快感从喉咙一直蔓延到全身，太爽了！
1371.english_text: Taking a huge gulp and letting that icy rush spread from my throat to my whole body feels amazing!

1372.chinese_text: 虽然我知道它含糖量很高，但我还是忍不住想要来一口……
1372.english_text: I know it's high in sugar, but I still can't help wanting a sip...

1373.chinese_text: 这款可乐是不是有魔法？每一次喝它都能让我感到快乐！
1373.english_text: Does this cola have magic? It makes me happy every single time!

1374.chinese_text: 不管快乐还是难过，一杯可乐似乎总能给我带来慰藉……
1374.english_text: Whether happy or sad, a cola always seems to offer some comfort...

1375.chinese_text: 如果这个世界上没有可乐，那我的生活将会失去多少乐趣啊！
1375.english_text: If there were no cola in this world, life would lose so much of its joy!

1376.chinese_text: 这杯可乐看起来这么完美，我甚至舍不得把它喝掉！
1376.english_text: This cola looks so perfect, I'm almost hesitant to drink it!

1377.chinese_text: 快快快，我要大口大口地喝个痛快，让所有烦恼都随着气泡烟消云散！
1377.english_text: Quick, let me take big gulps and let all my troubles vanish with the bubbles!

1378.chinese_text: 这个牌子的可乐总是能够保持一贯的高水准，从未让我失望过！
1378.english_text: This brand of cola always maintains its high standard; it never disappoints!

1379.chinese_text: 噢，可乐！你就是那个能让我瞬间充满活力的神秘药水！
1379.english_text: Oh, cola! You're the secret potion that fills me with instant energy!

1380.chinese_text: 感谢发明可乐的人，你给了我这个世界上最美妙的味觉体验！
1380.english_text: Thanks to the person who invented cola; you've given me the world's most wonderful taste experience!

1381.chinese_text: 又是美好的一天，该在这跑两圈了
1381.english_text: Another beautiful day, time to run a couple of laps here.

1382.chinese_text: 这个塑胶跑道手感真不错
1382.english_text: This synthetic track feels really good under my feet.

1383.chinese_text: 足球场上的草绿油油的，真想躺上去
1383.english_text: The grass on the football field is so green, I really want to lie down on it.

1384.chinese_text: 哎呀，今天怎么这么多人，我都挤不进去了
1384.english_text: Oh boy, why are there so many people today? I can't even squeeze in.

1385.chinese_text: 这里是以前学校的操场吗？好怀念
1385.english_text: Is this the playground from my old school? So nostalgic.

1386.chinese_text: 这个围栏是为了防止有人跑出去吗？
1386.english_text: Is this fence here to stop people from running out?

1387.chinese_text: 好想在这里踢场足球，可惜我不会
1387.english_text: I’d love to play a football match here, too bad I don't know how.

1388.chinese_text: 这个操场看起来挺大的，要跑多久才能绕一圈
1388.english_text: This playground looks quite big; I wonder how long it takes to run a lap.

1389.chinese_text: 这里的风吹得真舒服，最适合运动了
1389.english_text: The breeze here is so pleasant, perfect for exercising.

1390.chinese_text: 今天天气这么好，不来跑两圈真可惜
1390.english_text: It’s a pity not to run a few laps on such a beautiful day.

1391.chinese_text: 这里是专门给学生运动的地方吗？真幸福
1391.english_text: Is this a dedicated sports area for students? How lucky they are.

1392.chinese_text: 为什么这里没有篮球场？好奇怪
1392.english_text: Why isn't there a basketball court here? That's strange.

1393.chinese_text: 这个操场看起来有点旧了，该翻新了吧
1393.english_text: This playground looks a bit old; it might be time for a renovation.

1394.chinese_text: 我要是能在这个操场上跑一辈子就好了
1394.english_text: I wish I could run on this playground for the rest of my life.

1395.chinese_text: 这里有没有藏着什么秘密通道？
1395.english_text: Are there any secret passages hidden around here?

1396.chinese_text: 这个围栏看起来挺结实的，应该爬不上去吧
1396.english_text: This fence looks pretty sturdy; I doubt I could climb over it.

1397.chinese_text: 这里是不是以前发生过什么有趣的事情？
1397.english_text: Did something interesting happen here in the past?

1398.chinese_text: 我感觉我能在这个操场上跑得飞快
1398.english_text: I feel like I could run incredibly fast on this track.

1399.chinese_text: 这里是全学校最热闹的地方吗？
1399.english_text: Is this the liveliest spot in the whole school?

1400.chinese_text: 这里的草坪看起来挺软的，好想踩踩
1400.english_text: The lawn looks quite soft, I really want to step on it.

1401.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来好奇怪啊，叶子居然是蓝绿色的。
1401.english_text: This tree looks so strange; the leaves are actually blue-green.

1402.chinese_text: 这棵树长得真高大，我得抬头看才能看到顶。
1402.english_text: This tree is so tall; I have to look way up to see the top.

1403.chinese_text: 听说这棵树是这里的守护神，真的吗？
1403.english_text: I heard this tree is the guardian deity of this place, is that true?

1404.chinese_text: 这里怎么只有一棵树？其他植物去哪里了？
1404.english_text: Why is there only one tree here? Where did the other plants go?

1405.chinese_text: 我能在这棵树下休息一会儿吗？这里的空气好像特别清新。
1405.english_text: Can I rest under this tree for a bit? The air here feels exceptionally fresh.

1406.chinese_text: 这棵树的叶子看起来很柔软，我想摸摸。
1406.english_text: The leaves of this tree look very soft; I want to touch them.

1407.chinese_text: 它的树干看起来很结实，应该可以用来做船或者家具吧？
1407.english_text: Its trunk looks very sturdy; maybe it could be used to build a boat or furniture?

1408.chinese_text: 我能在这棵树上刻上我的名字吗？这样我就能永远记住这里了。
1408.english_text: Can I carve my name into this tree? That way I'll remember this place forever.

1409.chinese_text: 这棵树好像有很多秘密，我想深入了解。
1409.english_text: This tree seems to hold many secrets; I want to know more.

1410.chinese_text: 这棵树是不是传说中的智慧之树？
1410.english_text: Could this be the legendary Tree of Wisdom?

1411.chinese_text: 这里好像没有任何动物，这棵树是唯一的生命吗？
1411.english_text: There seem to be no animals here; is this tree the only life form?

1412.chinese_text: 这棵树的根部露在外面，看起来很有趣。
1412.english_text: The roots of this tree are exposed, which looks quite interesting.

1413.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来很有年份，它经历了多少风雨?
1413.english_text: This tree looks very old; I wonder how many storms it has weathered.

1414.chinese_text: 这里的景色真美，这棵树是这里的焦点。
1414.english_text: The scenery is beautiful, and this tree is the centerpiece.

1415.chinese_text: 这棵树的树冠很大，可以为我遮阳。
1415.english_text: The canopy is huge; it can provide some shade for me.

1416.chinese_text: 它的树干是棕色的，跟叶子的颜色很搭配。
1416.english_text: Its trunk is brown, which complements the color of the leaves perfectly.

1417.chinese_text: 这棵树是唯一的吗？我在其他地方都没见过这样的树。
1417.english_text: Is this tree one of a kind? I’ve never seen anything like it elsewhere.

1418.chinese_text: 我能把它的叶子带走吗？我可以用它做药或者装饰。
1418.english_text: Can I take a leaf? I could use it for medicine or decoration.

1419.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来很有灵气，我能在这里祈祷吗？
1419.english_text: This tree looks very spiritual; can I pray here?

1420.chinese_text: 这棵树是我的朋友，我每次来都会跟它说话。
1420.english_text: This tree is my friend; I talk to it every time I visit.

1421.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来很精神啊，叶子郁郁葱葱的。
1421.english_text: This tree looks very lively; its leaves are so lush.

1422.chinese_text: 呼，在树荫下休息一会儿，真凉快。
1422.english_text: Phew, resting in the shade for a bit is so refreshing.

1423.chinese_text: 如果我是一只鸟，我会在这棵树上筑巢。
1423.english_text: If I were a bird, I would build my nest in this tree.

1424.chinese_text: 这棵树的木材应该很不错，可以用来做家具。
1424.english_text: The wood from this tree should be quite good for making furniture.

1425.chinese_text: 有人在树干上刻了字？我也想刻一个。
1425.english_text: Someone carved words into the trunk? I want to carve something too.

1426.chinese_text: 这里适合野餐，如果我带了食物的话。
1426.english_text: This is a great spot for a picnic, if only I had brought food.

1427.chinese_text: 每天看着这棵树，心情都会变好。
1427.english_text: Looking at this tree every day always improves my mood.

1428.chinese_text: 哎呀，这树皮摸起来很粗糙，但我喜欢。
1428.english_text: Oh, the bark feels quite rough, but I like it.

1429.chinese_text: 这个高度正好，我要爬上去看看风景。
1429.english_text: This height is perfect; I'm going to climb up and see the view.

1430.chinese_text: 这棵树能活多久？一定比我活得长。
1430.english_text: How long can this tree live? Surely longer than me.

1431.chinese_text: 我可以在这棵树旁边种一些花，让它看起来更漂亮。
1431.english_text: I could plant some flowers next to this tree to make it look even prettier.

1432.chinese_text: 好大的树啊，可以挡风避雨。
1432.english_text: What a massive tree; it can shield me from wind and rain.

1433.chinese_text: 如果有人在树下埋了宝藏，那该多好。
1433.english_text: Wouldn't it be great if someone buried treasure under this tree?

1434.chinese_text: 这棵树的颜色真特别，我很喜欢。
1434.english_text: The color of this tree is so unique; I really like it.

1435.chinese_text: 我想在这棵树下睡个午觉，如果我有时间的话。
1435.english_text: I'd love to take a nap under this tree if I had the time.

1436.chinese_text: 这里真安静，只有我和这棵树。
1436.english_text: It’s so quiet here, just me and this tree.

1437.chinese_text: 这棵树一定见过很多故事，我真想听听。
1437.english_text: This tree must have witnessed many stories; I wish I could hear them.

1438.chinese_text: 有人在树枝上挂了许愿牌？我也想挂一个。
1438.english_text: Someone hung a wish plaque on a branch? I want to hang one too.

1439.chinese_text: 这棵树的根一定扎得很快，我也想在这里安家。
1439.english_text: This tree’s roots must be deep; I kind of want to make my home here too.

1440.chinese_text: 这棵树让我想起了我的家乡，那个也有很多树的地方。
1440.english_text: This tree reminds me of my hometown, a place with many trees.

1441.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来有点年头了，它的根扎得很深。
1441.english_text: This tree looks quite old; its roots are buried very deep.

1442.chinese_text: 我好像能听到这棵树在风中低语。
1442.english_text: I feel like I can hear the tree whispering in the wind.

1443.chinese_text: 这里的空气因为这棵树而变得更加清新。
1443.english_text: The air here is fresher because of this tree.

1444.chinese_text: 它的树皮摸起来很粗糙，但我喜欢这种质感。
1444.english_text: Its bark feels rough, but I like the texture.

1445.chinese_text: 我想在这棵树下睡个午觉。
1445.english_text: I’d like to take a nap under this tree.

1446.chinese_text: 这棵树是这个森林中最美丽的。
1446.english_text: This tree is the most beautiful one in the entire forest.

1447.chinese_text: 它的叶子在阳光下闪闪发光。
1447.english_text: Its leaves are shimmering in the sunlight.

1448.chinese_text: 我经常在这里和这棵树聊天。
1448.english_text: I often come here to chat with this tree.

1449.chinese_text: 这棵树见证了这个森林的许多故事。
1449.english_text: This tree has witnessed many stories of this forest.

1450.chinese_text: 这棵树的果实非常美味。
1450.english_text: The fruit of this tree is absolutely delicious.

1451.chinese_text: 我希望能保护这棵树，让它继续生长。
1451.english_text: I hope to protect this tree so it can keep growing.

1452.chinese_text: 这棵树的根好像有某种神秘的力量。
1452.english_text: The roots of this tree seem to possess some mysterious power.

1453.chinese_text: 它的树枝在天空中伸展，好像在向神祈祷。
1453.english_text: Its branches stretch toward the sky, as if praying to the gods.

1454.chinese_text: 我能感觉到这棵树蕴含着一股强大的生命力。
1454.english_text: I can feel a powerful life force within this tree.

1455.chinese_text: 这里是我的秘密基地，只有我和这棵树知道。
1455.english_text: This is my secret base; only the tree and I know about it.

1456.chinese_text: 这棵树的叶子在秋天会变成美丽的黄色。
1456.english_text: The leaves of this tree turn a beautiful yellow in autumn.

1457.chinese_text: 这棵树在冬天会变得更加光秃秃，但它依然很美。
1457.english_text: The tree becomes bare in winter, but it's still beautiful.

1458.chinese_text: 这棵树是我在这个森林中最好的朋友。
1458.english_text: This tree is my best friend in the forest.

1459.chinese_text: 这棵树的叶子在春天会变成美丽的绿色。
1459.english_text: The leaves turn a beautiful green in the spring.

1460.chinese_text: 这棵树的果实在夏天会变成美丽的红色。
1460.english_text: The fruit turns a beautiful red in the summer.

1461.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来很健康，叶子很绿
1461.english_text: This tree looks very healthy, the leaves are so green.

1462.chinese_text: 我记得这棵树在这里很久了
1462.english_text: I remember this tree being here for a long time.

1463.chinese_text: 树根很结实，一直延伸到地下
1463.english_text: The roots are very strong, reaching deep into the ground.

1464.chinese_text: 这里的空气真清新，多亏了这些树
1464.english_text: The air is so fresh here, thanks to these trees.

1465.english_text: This tree is a good spot to take a rest.

1466.chinese_text: 这棵树的木材应该不错
1466.english_text: The wood from this tree should be of good quality.

1467.chinese_text: 这棵树的叶子在阳光下闪闪发光
1467.english_text: The leaves of this tree are glistening in the sun.

1468.english_text: I enjoy listening to the birds chirping here.

1469.english_text: The bark of this tree is quite rough.

1470.chinese_text: 这棵树的影子很大，可以遮阳
1470.english_text: The tree casts a large shadow, perfect for shade.

1472.chinese_text: 这棵树的叶子看起来很茂盛
1472.english_text: The leaves of this tree look very lush.

1474.english_text: The colors of this tree are very rich.

1476.english_text: The shape of this tree is very unique.

1478.chinese_text: 这棵树的叶子看起来很柔软
1478.english_text: The leaves of this tree look very soft.

1480.english_text: This tree has very strong vitality.

1481.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来病恹恹的，叶子全黄了。
1481.english_text: This tree looks sickly; all its leaves have turned yellow.

1482.chinese_text: 即使生病了，它依然屹立不倒。
1482.english_text: Even though it's sick, it still stands tall.

1483.chinese_text: 如果我能治好它，也许能得到什么奖励。
1483.english_text: If I can cure it, maybe I'll get some kind of reward.

1484.chinese_text: 我想知道它为什么会生病。
1484.english_text: I wonder why it fell ill.

1485.chinese_text: 或许是因为土壤污染，或者是因为水源问题。
1485.english_text: Maybe it's soil pollution, or perhaps a problem with the water source.

1486.chinese_text: 我应该去找一些解药或治疗方法。
1486.english_text: I should go find some antidote or a way to treat it.

1487.chinese_text: 它的叶子正在一片片掉落。
1487.english_text: Its leaves are falling off one by one.

1488.chinese_text: 它的生命正在慢慢消逝。
1488.english_text: Its life is slowly fading away.

1489.chinese_text: 我感到很悲伤，看着它这样。
1489.english_text: It makes me sad to see it like this.

1490.chinese_text: 我希望它能快点好起来。
1490.english_text: I hope it gets better soon.

1491.chinese_text: 或许我可以用我的魔法治好它。
1491.english_text: Maybe I can cure it with my magic.

1492.chinese_text: 或者我可以请一位德鲁伊帮忙。
1492.english_text: Or I could ask a Druid for help.

1493.chinese_text: 这棵树对这个地区很重要，不能让它死掉。
1493.english_text: This tree is important to this area; we can't let it die.

1494.chinese_text: 我会尽一切努力治好它。
1494.english_text: I will do everything I can to cure it.

1495.chinese_text: 虽然它的叶子全黄了，但它的根还很强壮。
1495.english_text: Although its leaves are all yellow, its roots are still strong.

1496.english_text: This gives me a little bit of hope.

1497.chinese_text: 我会找到原因，并治好它。
1497.english_text: I will find the cause and fix it.

1498.chinese_text: 等它好起来，它的叶子会再次变绿。
1498.english_text: When it recovers, its leaves will turn green again.

1499.english_text: It will burst with life once more.

1500.chinese_text: 这就是我的使命，保护大自然。
1500.english_text: This is my mission: to protect nature.

1501.chinese_text: 这棵树的叶子已经全黄了，秋天真的到了。
1501.english_text: The leaves are all yellow; autumn has truly arrived.

1502.chinese_text: 看起来是一棵很古老的树，树干真粗。
1502.english_text: It looks like a very ancient tree; the trunk is so thick.

1503.chinese_text: 不知道这棵树在这里矗立了多少年。
1503.english_text: I wonder how many years this tree has stood here.

1504.chinese_text: 这里的景色真不错，适合休息一下。
1504.english_text: The scenery here is quite nice, perfect for a short break.

1505.chinese_text: 这棵树的颜色真漂亮，金黄金黄的。
1505.english_text: The color of this tree is beautiful—golden yellow.

1506.chinese_text: 我喜欢这棵树的像素风格，很有趣。
1506.english_text: I like the pixel style of this tree; it's very interesting.

1507.chinese_text: 这棵树下好像很凉快，真想在这睡一觉。
1507.english_text: It seems cool under this tree; I'd love to take a nap here.

1508.chinese_text: 树根那里好像有些小草，生命力真顽强。
1508.english_text: There’s some grass by the roots; what resilient life.

1509.chinese_text: 这里的空气真清新，都是大自然的味道。
1509.english_text: The air is so fresh here, filled with the scent of nature.

1510.chinese_text: 这棵树是这个场景的焦点，非常引人注目。
1510.english_text: This tree is the focus of this scene, very eye-catching.

1511.chinese_text: 这里的像素艺术真精美，连树叶的纹理都看得清楚。
1511.english_text: The pixel art here is exquisite; you can even see the texture of the leaves.

1512.chinese_text: 这棵树让我想起了我的家乡，那里也有很多这样的树。
1512.english_text: This tree reminds me of my hometown; there were many trees like this there.

1513.chinese_text: 这棵树下也许藏着什么秘密，我要仔细找找。
1513.english_text: Maybe there's a secret hidden under this tree; I should look carefully.

1514.chinese_text: 这里的颜色搭配真和谐，让人感觉很舒服。
1514.english_text: The color coordination here is so harmonious; it feels very comfortable.

1515.chinese_text: 这棵树的形状真奇特，像一个巨大的蘑菇。
1515.english_text: The shape of this tree is peculiar, like a giant mushroom.

1516.chinese_text: 这里的像素风格让我想起了小时候玩的游戏。
1516.english_text: The pixel style reminds me of the games I played as a kid.

1517.chinese_text: 这棵树下真安静，只有风吹过树叶的声音。
1517.english_text: It's so quiet under this tree, only the sound of the wind through the leaves.

1518.chinese_text: 这棵树真高，我要抬头才能看到树顶。
1518.english_text: This tree is so tall; I have to look up to see the top.

1519.chinese_text: 这里的景色真美，我要把它拍下来。
1519.english_text: The scenery is beautiful; I want to take a picture of it.

1520.chinese_text: 这棵树让我想起了很多美好的回忆。
1520.english_text: This tree brings back many wonderful memories.

1521.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来很精神啊！

1522.chinese_text: 真是一棵强壮的大树，比我都高。
1522.english_text: What a strong tree, it’s taller than me.

1523.chinese_text: 夏天在这里乘凉一定很舒服。
1523.english_text: It must be very comfortable to enjoy the shade here in summer.

1524.chinese_text: 这里的树木都长得很好，多亏了领主的治理。
1524.english_text: The trees here grow well, thanks to the lord's management.

1525.chinese_text: 我能感觉到这棵树里流动着生命力。
1525.english_text: I can feel the life force flowing within this tree.

1526.chinese_text: 这棵树的木材看起来不错，可以做成好家具。
1526.english_text: The wood from this tree looks good; it could make fine furniture.

1527.chinese_text: 嗯，我要在这里刻个记号，免得迷路。
1527.english_text: Hmm, I'll carve a mark here so I don't get lost.

1528.chinese_text: 哎，这树皮太硬了，刻不动。
1528.english_text: Sigh, the bark is too hard; I can't carve into it.

1529.chinese_text: 这树枝上的叶子真绿啊，看得我心情好多了。
1529.english_text: The leaves on these branches are so green, they really cheer me up.

1530.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来有些年头了。
1530.english_text: This tree looks like it’s been around for quite a few years.

1531.chinese_text: 这里风景真好，有山有水还有树。
1531.english_text: The scenery is great here, with mountains, water, and trees.

1532.chinese_text: 感觉这棵树在看着我……是我错觉吗？
1532.english_text: I feel like this tree is watching me... is it just my imagination?

1533.chinese_text: 这里的空气真清新，多亏了这些树。
1533.english_text: The air is so fresh here, thanks to all these trees.

1534.chinese_text: 这棵树的根部真粗壮，一定抓地很牢。
1534.english_text: The roots are so thick; they must have a very firm grip on the ground.

1535.chinese_text: 如果我能爬上去，就能看得更远了。
1535.english_text: If I could climb up, I’d be able to see much further.

1536.english_text: Alas, I'm too heavy to climb up.

1537.chinese_text: 这棵树的叶子沙沙作响，像在唱歌。
1537.english_text: The leaves are rustling, sounding like they’re singing.

1538.chinese_text: 有没有人在树下藏了宝贝？让我找找。
1538.english_text: Did anyone hide treasure under the tree? Let me look.

1539.english_text: Hmm, just some ants, how disappointing.

1540.chinese_text: 走啦走啦，还要继续冒险呢。
1540.english_text: Time to go, the adventure must continue.

1541.chinese_text: 这棵树真高啊！我也想长得这么高。
1541.english_text: This tree is so tall! I wish I could grow that tall too.

1542.chinese_text: 风吹过树叶沙沙作响，听起来像是在唱歌。
1542.english_text: The wind rustling through the leaves sounds like singing.

1543.chinese_text: 夏天在这里乘凉真不错。
1543.english_text: Resting in the shade here during summer is wonderful.

1544.english_text: The bark feels very rough to the touch.

1545.chinese_text: 这树根都露在外面了，小心别绊倒。
1545.english_text: The roots are exposed; be careful not to trip.

1546.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来很有精神，叶子很绿。
1546.english_text: This tree looks very vibrant with such green leaves.

1547.chinese_text: 秋天的时候，树叶会变黄吗？
1547.english_text: Will the leaves turn yellow when autumn comes?

1548.chinese_text: 我能在这棵树上搭个树屋吗？
1548.english_text: Can I build a treehouse on this tree?

1549.english_text: Are there any bird nests in the tree?

1550.chinese_text: 这棵树在这里站了很久了吧。
1550.english_text: This tree must have stood here for a long time.

1551.chinese_text: 这里的光线被树叶挡住了，有点暗。
1551.english_text: The light is blocked by the leaves; it's a bit dark here.

1552.chinese_text: 这棵树好像比我还要高两倍。
1552.english_text: This tree seems to be twice as tall as I am.

1553.chinese_text: 我能爬上去吗？看起来有点难。
1553.english_text: Can I climb up? It looks a bit difficult.

1554.english_text: The color of this tree is really beautiful.

1555.english_text: The pixels of the leaves are so clear.

1556.chinese_text: 这里有一股清新的木头味。
1556.english_text: There’s a fresh scent of wood here.

1557.chinese_text: 这棵树是游戏里的装饰吗？
1557.english_text: Is this tree just a decoration in the game?

1558.chinese_text: 我觉得这棵树可能藏着什么秘密。
1558.english_text: I feel like this tree might be hiding a secret.

1559.chinese_text: 这棵树站在这里，就像一个守护者。
1559.english_text: Standing here, this tree looks like a guardian.

1560.chinese_text: 它的树干很粗，看来是一棵老树了。
1560.english_text: Its trunk is very thick; it must be an old tree.

1561.chinese_text: 这棵树真茂盛，是个乘凉的好地方
1561.english_text: This tree is so lush, a great place for shade.

1562.chinese_text: 不知道这棵树活了多久了
1562.english_text: I wonder how long this tree has lived.

1563.chinese_text: 树根居然长在岩石上，生命力真顽强
1563.english_text: The roots actually grow on rock; what resilient vitality.

1564.chinese_text: 风吹过树叶的声音真好听
1564.english_text: The sound of the wind through the leaves is lovely.

1565.chinese_text: 这里居然有棵这么大的树，以前没注意过
1565.english_text: I never noticed such a large tree here before.

1567.english_text: It feels much cooler in the shade of the tree.

1568.chinese_text: 如果我有把斧头...算了，还是别破坏环境了
1568.english_text: If I had an axe... never mind, better not damage the environment.

1569.chinese_text: 这棵树看起来很健康，充满了活力
1569.english_text: This tree looks very healthy and full of life.

1570.chinese_text: 这让我想起了小时候家门口的那棵树
1570.english_text: This reminds me of the tree in front of my house when I was a kid.

1571.chinese_text: 这里真是个休息的好地方
1571.english_text: This is truly a great spot to rest.

1572.english_text: I wonder if there are bird nests in the tree?

1573.chinese_text: 这棵树的像素风格挺特别的
1573.english_text: The pixel style of this tree is quite unique.

1574.chinese_text: 希望这棵树能一直长在这里
1574.english_text: I hope this tree can keep growing here forever.

1575.chinese_text: 感觉这棵树是有灵性的
1575.english_text: I feel like this tree has a soul.

1576.chinese_text: 不知道这棵树下有没有埋着什么宝藏
1576.english_text: I wonder if there's any treasure buried under this tree.

1577.chinese_text: 这里的空气因为这棵树变得更清新了
1577.english_text: The air has become fresher because of this tree.

1578.english_text: This tree has grown so straight.

1579.chinese_text: 这里真安静，只有我和这棵树
1579.english_text: It's so quiet here, just me and this tree.

1580.chinese_text: 该继续赶路了，再见，老朋友
1580.english_text: Time to keep moving. Goodbye, old friend.

1581.chinese_text: 这片灌木丛看起来很茂密，也许里面藏着什么好东西？
1581.english_text: This bush looks very dense; maybe there’s something good hidden inside?

1582.chinese_text: 注意脚下！灌木丛可能有刺，别被划伤了。
1582.english_text: Watch your step! The bushes might have thorns, don't get scratched.

1583.chinese_text: 这些绿叶在微风中摇曳，景色真不错。
1583.english_text: These green leaves swaying in the breeze—it’s a nice view.

1584.chinese_text: 哎呀，我的衣角被这片灌木丛挂住了！
1584.english_text: Oh no, my hem got caught on the bush!

1585.chinese_text: 灌木丛后面隐约能看到一条小路，我们要不要去探索一下？
1585.english_text: I can vaguely see a path behind the bushes, shall we explore?

1586.chinese_text: 这里的灌木丛生长得真是肆无忌惮，几乎要把路堵死了。
1586.english_text: The bushes here grow so recklessly, they’ve almost blocked the road.

1587.chinese_text: 小心！有些神奇生物喜欢在灌木丛里筑巢。
1587.english_text: Careful! Some magical creatures like to nest in bushes.

1588.chinese_text: 这些灌木丛是天然的屏障，可以用来躲避敌人的视线。
1588.english_text: These bushes are a natural barrier, perfect for staying out of enemy sight.

1589.chinese_text: 哇，这片灌木丛里开满了不知名的小花，真漂亮。
1589.english_text: Wow, this bush is full of unknown little flowers, so pretty.

1590.chinese_text: 这里的灌木丛似乎比其他地方的要暗淡一些，也许有什么异样？
1590.english_text: The bushes here seem duller than elsewhere; maybe something is wrong?

1591.chinese_text: 我们需要一把锋利的剪刀来修剪这些挡路的灌木丛。
1591.english_text: We need sharp shears to trim these obstructing bushes.

1592.chinese_text: 灌木丛中传来沙沙的响声，是什么在移动？
1592.english_text: A rustling sound is coming from the bushes—what's moving?

1593.chinese_text: 这片灌木丛真是一个捉迷藏的好地方！
1593.english_text: This bush is a perfect spot for hide-and-seek!

1594.chinese_text: 注意观察灌木丛的形状，有时它们会给出一些线索。
1594.english_text: Pay attention to the shape of the bushes; sometimes they provide clues.

1595.chinese_text: 这些灌木丛的叶子看起来有些枯萎，是不是缺水了？
1595.english_text: The leaves on these bushes look a bit withered; is it lacking water?

1596.chinese_text: 在野外，灌木丛可以为我们提供一些荫蔽，免受烈日暴晒。
1596.english_text: In the wild, bushes can provide some shade from the scorching sun.

1597.chinese_text: 小心！有些灌木丛是带有剧毒的，千万不要误食。
1597.english_text: Careful! Some bushes are poisonous, don't eat anything by mistake.

1598.chinese_text: 这些灌木丛是这片森林的守护者，见证了无数故事。
1598.english_text: These bushes are the guardians of this forest, witnessing countless stories.

1599.chinese_text: 我们可以在灌木丛旁边生火，但要注意火况，别把灌木丛引燃了。
1599.english_text: We can build a fire near the bushes, but be careful not to ignite them.

1600.chinese_text: 这片灌木丛真是太美了，我要把它的样子画下来！
1600.english_text: This bush is so beautiful, I want to draw it!

1601.chinese_text: 这棵灌木看起来好鲜艳，粉红粉红的。
1601.english_text: This shrub looks so vibrant, all pink and pretty.

1602.chinese_text: 它是怎么长成这个样子的？
1602.english_text: How did it grow to look like this?

1603.chinese_text: 这里的空气真好，连灌木也长得这么有活力。
1603.english_text: The air is so good here, even the shrubs grow with such vitality.

1604.chinese_text: 我想采摘一些粉红色的叶子，装饰我的家。
1604.english_text: I want to pick some pink leaves to decorate my home.

1605.chinese_text: 这棵灌木会不会是魔法灌木？
1605.english_text: Could this be a magical shrub?

1606.chinese_text: 我喜欢这棵灌木的颜色，真特别。
1606.english_text: I love the color of this shrub; it's very unique.

1607.english_text: it's a unique part of the scenery here.

1608.chinese_text: 我想把它移植到我的花园里。
1608.english_text: I’d like to transplant it into my garden.

1609.chinese_text: 这棵灌木的形状有点奇怪，像个小怪物。
1609.english_text: The shape of this shrub is a bit odd, like a little monster.

1610.chinese_text: 这里的水和土壤一定很特别，才能养活这棵灌木。
1610.english_text: The water and soil here must be special to sustain this shrub.

1611.chinese_text: 这棵灌木是不是有剧毒？我还是别碰它。
1611.english_text: Is this shrub poisonous? I'd better not touch it.

1612.chinese_text: 这里的风景真美，连灌木也长得这么好看。
1612.english_text: The scenery is so beautiful; even the shrubs look lovely.

1613.chinese_text: 我想在这里野餐，看着这棵灌木。
1613.english_text: I want to have a picnic here while looking at this shrub.

1614.chinese_text: 这棵灌木的颜色让我想起了春天。
1614.english_text: The color of this shrub reminds me of springtime.

1615.chinese_text: 这里的鸟儿一定很喜欢这棵灌木。
1615.english_text: The birds here must really like this shrub.

1616.chinese_text: 这棵灌木的叶子摸起来一定很柔软。
1616.english_text: The leaves of this shrub must feel very soft to the touch.

1617.chinese_text: 我想在这里画画，记录下这棵灌木。
1617.english_text: I want to paint here and record this shrub.

1618.chinese_text: 这棵灌木的香味一定很迷人。
1618.english_text: The scent of this shrub must be quite enchanting.

1619.chinese_text: 这里真是一个神奇的地方，连灌木也这么特别。
1619.english_text: This is truly a magical place where even the shrubs are so special.

1620.chinese_text: 我会把这棵灌木推荐给我的朋友们。
1620.english_text: I will recommend this shrub to my friends.

1621.chinese_text: 这灌木丛颜色真怪，是蓝紫色的，很少见呢。
1621.english_text: The color of this bush is so strange—blue-violet, quite rare.

1622.chinese_text: 这颜色太不自然了，感觉有点儿瘆人……
1622.english_text: This color is so unnatural, it feels a bit creepy...

1623.chinese_text: 颜色这么深，里面会不会藏着什么危险的东西？
1623.english_text: It's so dark; could there be something dangerous hidden inside?

1624.chinese_text: 这里面，是不是有什么东西在盯着我看？
1624.english_text: Is there something in there staring at me?

1625.chinese_text: 每次经过这里，我都觉得心神不宁，怪可怕的。
1625.english_text: Every time I pass by, I feel uneasy; it's quite scary.

1626.chinese_text: 这灌木……它好像在微微颤动？是我眼花了吗？
1626.english_text: This bush... is it trembling slightly? Or am I seeing things?

1627.chinese_text: 这上面好像有什么紫色的纹路……还是符号？看不清楚。
1627.english_text: There seem to be some purple patterns on it... or symbols? I can't see clearly.

1628.chinese_text: 这种颜色，该不会是中毒了吧？我还是离远点儿。
1628.english_text: Could this color mean it's poisoned? I'd better stay away.

1629.chinese_text: 这灌木看起来怪怪的，总觉得它不是普通的植物。
1629.english_text: This bush looks weird; I feel like it's no ordinary plant.

1630.chinese_text: 或许我可以用我的剑砍砍看？万一有什么发现呢。
1630.english_text: Maybe I should try hacking at it with my sword? I might find something.

1631.chinese_text: 唔，要是它能掉点什么稀有的东西就好了，比如这种颜色的叶子。
1631.english_text: Hmm, it’d be great if it dropped something rare, like these colored leaves.

1632.chinese_text: 颜色越深，毒性越强……这在森林里可是常识。
1632.english_text: The darker the color, the stronger the toxin... that's common knowledge in the forest.

1633.chinese_text: 它看起来好孤独啊，在这里只有它一个是这种颜色。
1633.english_text: It looks so lonely; it's the only one here with this color.

1634.chinese_text: 这紫色和蓝色的渐变，倒是挺好看的，就是感觉不太祥和。
1634.english_text: This purple and blue gradient is actually quite nice, but it doesn't feel peaceful.

1635.chinese_text: 或许我可以带点样本回去，给炼金术士看看。
1635.english_text: Maybe I could take a sample back for the alchemist to look at.

1636.chinese_text: 这上面的紫色环状物，像是一个个小眼睛一样。
1636.english_text: Those purple rings look like a bunch of little eyes.

1637.chinese_text: 这灌木长在这里，该不会是有什么风水讲究吧？
1637.english_text: Could the placement of this bush have something to do with Feng Shui?

1638.chinese_text: 还是快点离开这里吧，这地方让我浑身难受。
1638.english_text: Let's get out of here; this place makes my skin crawl.

1639.chinese_text: 看起来没什么特别的，就是颜色有点儿不一样。
1639.english_text: It doesn't seem like much, just the color is a bit different.

1640.chinese_text: 这灌木丛，一定藏着什么我不懂的秘密。
1640.english_text: This bush must be hiding a secret I don't understand.

1641.chinese_text: 这丛灌木长得可真茂盛，把路都快遮住了。
1641.english_text: This shrub has grown so lush, it’s almost covering the path.

1642.chinese_text: 嗯……闻起来有一股泥土和清新的草木味。
1642.english_text: Hmm... it smells like earth and fresh greenery.

1643.chinese_text: 哎呀，小心，这上面有些刺，可别扎到了。
1643.english_text: Oh, watch out, there are some thorns on this, don't get pricked.

1644.chinese_text: 这片绿意看着真让人心情舒畅。
1644.english_text: This greenery is really refreshing to look at.

1645.chinese_text: 每次经过这里，都感觉空气特别好。
1645.english_text: Every time I pass by here, the air feels especially good.

1646.chinese_text: 这里面是不是藏着什么小动物？
1646.english_text: Is there some small animal hiding inside?

1647.chinese_text: 这些叶子的颜色层次感很丰富嘛。
1647.english_text: The layers of color in these leaves are quite rich.

1648.chinese_text: 听说这种灌木的果实可以酿酒，不知道是不是真的。
1648.english_text: I heard the fruit of this shrub can be used for making wine; I wonder if it’s true.

1649.chinese_text: 哇，好大一团灌木，简直像个小迷宫。
1649.english_text: Wow, what a huge bunch of shrubs, it’s almost like a little maze.

1650.chinese_text: 夏天在它旁边乘凉肯定很不错。
1650.english_text: Resting in the shade next to it in summer would be great.

1651.chinese_text: 这灌木看起来很健康，生命力真顽强。
1651.english_text: This shrub looks very healthy, such strong vitality.

1652.chinese_text: 这里以前好像没这么大一丛，长得真快。
1652.english_text: It didn’t seem this big before; it sure grows fast.

1653.chinese_text: 如果我是一只兔子，我就住在里面。
1653.english_text: If I were a rabbit, I’d live inside it.

1654.chinese_text: 这灌木的形状……嗯，有点像个大绿球。
1654.english_text: The shape of this shrub... hmm, a bit like a big green ball.

1655.chinese_text: 这些小叶子在风中摇曳的样子挺可爱的。
1655.english_text: These little leaves swaying in the wind are quite cute.

1656.chinese_text: 这里面会不会有掉落的硬币？我来找找看。
1656.english_text: Could there be any dropped coins inside? Let me look.

1657.chinese_text: 这里的叶子好像比别处的更绿一些。
1657.english_text: The leaves here seem greener than in other places.

1658.chinese_text: 这丛灌木是这个花园的一大景观。
1658.english_text: This patch of shrubs is a major feature of this garden.

1659.chinese_text: 走近一看，里面的树枝错综复杂。
1659.english_text: Looking closely, the branches inside are quite intricate.

1660.chinese_text: 阳光洒在上面，叶子都在闪闪发光呢。
1660.english_text: With the sun shining on it, the leaves are all shimmering.

1661.chinese_text: 这丛灌木长得可真茂盛，都快把路给挡住了。
1661.english_text: This bush is growing so lushly; it’s almost blocking the path.

1662.chinese_text: 里面是不是藏了什么东西？总觉得有视线……
1662.english_text: Is something hidden inside? I feel like I'm being watched...

1663.chinese_text: 颜色好奇怪的灌木，上半部分是青色，下半部分是深蓝色。
1663.english_text: What a strange color for a bush—cyan on top and deep blue on the bottom.

1664.chinese_text: 哎呀，小心别被树枝挂到了。
1664.english_text: Oops, be careful not to get snagged by the branches.

1665.chinese_text: 这味道……有点提神，又有点奇怪。
1665.english_text: This scent... it's a bit refreshing but also a little strange.

1666.chinese_text: 这丛灌木好像是新搬来的，以前没见过。
1666.english_text: This bush seems new; I haven't seen it before.

1667.chinese_text: 这里面会不会有野兔什么的？
1667.english_text: Could there be wild rabbits or something in there?

1668.chinese_text: 真想放把火烧了它，看着就碍眼。
1668.english_text: I really want to set it on fire; it's such an eyesore.

1669.chinese_text: 这种颜色的植物，在别的地图可没见过。
1669.english_text: I’ve never seen a plant of this color on other maps.

1670.chinese_text: 这颜色，是不是被魔法影响了？
1670.english_text: Could this color be due to magical influence?

1671.chinese_text: 这里面肯定藏着什么不可告人的秘密。
1671.english_text: There must be some unspeakable secret hidden in here.

1672.chinese_text: 哎呀，我的金币是不是掉这附近了？
1672.english_text: Oh, did I drop my gold coins near here?

1673.chinese_text: 这灌木丛，看着就像是个天然的屏障。
1673.english_text: This bush looks like a natural barrier.

1674.chinese_text: 这颜色，让我想起了家乡的那条河。
1674.english_text: This color reminds me of the river back in my hometown.

1676.chinese_text: 这里面肯定藏着什么宝贝！
1676.english_text: There must be some treasure hidden in there!

1677.chinese_text: 这颜色，看着就像是被诅咒了。
1677.english_text: This color makes it look like it's been cursed.

1678.chinese_text: 这灌木丛，看着就像是个迷宫。
1678.english_text: This bush looks like a maze.

1679.chinese_text: 这里面肯定藏着什么陷阱！
1679.english_text: There must be some traps hidden inside!

1680.chinese_text: 这颜色，看着就像是个神秘的入口。
1680.english_text: This color makes it look like a mysterious entrance.

1681.chinese_text: 这团粉红色的植物好生奇怪，怎么感觉像一大坨棉花糖扎在泥巴里？
1681.english_text: This bunch of pink plants is so strange; why does it look like a giant marshmallow stuck in the mud?

1682.chinese_text: 这里的泥土颜色这么深，想必这棵植物是从很远的地方移植过来的吧。
1682.english_text: The soil here is so dark; this plant must have been transplanted from somewhere far away.

1683.chinese_text: 居然是像素风格的植物，看来我是真的生活在一个电子游戏里了。
1683.english_text: Pixelated plants? It seems I really am living in a video game.

1684.chinese_text: 这么完美的圆形，是人工修剪的，还是有什么魔法的影响？
1684.english_text: Such a perfect circle—is it manually trimmed, or is it under some magical influence?

1685.chinese_text: 这棵植物的根部黑乎乎的，看起来不太健康，也许我应该给它施点肥。
1685.english_text: The roots are all black and look unhealthy; maybe I should give it some fertilizer.

1686.chinese_text: 粉红色的树冠，如果是春天，那一定美极了，可惜现在是夏天。
1686.english_text: A pink canopy would be stunning in spring, but too bad it’s summer now.

1687.chinese_text: 这种植物的果实能吃吗？还是只是用来观赏的？
1687.english_text: Are the fruits of this plant edible, or is it just for show?

1688.chinese_text: 泥土上有个阴影，看来这棵植物已经在这里站了很久了。
1688.english_text: There's a shadow on the mud; looks like this plant has been here for a long time.

1689.chinese_text: 这颜色真鲜艳，在这一片灰蒙蒙的像素世界里真是太显眼了。
1689.english_text: The color is so vibrant; it really stands out in this grey pixelated world.

1690.chinese_text: 它看起来有点孤独，也许我应该在旁边再种一棵。
1690.english_text: It looks a bit lonely; maybe I should plant another one nearby.

1691.chinese_text: 这棵植物的像素颗粒感真重，我的眼睛都要看花了。
1691.english_text: The pixelation on this plant is so heavy, my eyes are starting to blur.

1692.chinese_text: 这让我想起了我小时候玩的那款老游戏，那里的植物也是这个样子的。
1692.english_text: This reminds me of an old game I played as a kid; the plants there looked just like this.

1693.chinese_text: 也许这是一个隐藏的道具，只要我用力摇一摇，就会有金币掉出来。
1693.english_text: Maybe it's a hidden item; if I shake it hard enough, will gold coins fall out?

1694.chinese_text: 这泥土的颜色和背景真不搭，看来是制作组偷懒了。
1694.english_text: The mud color doesn't match the background; looks like the devs got lazy.

1695.chinese_text: 这么小的一棵植物，居然能长出这么大的树冠，真是奇迹。
1695.english_text: Such a small plant growing such a large canopy is truly a miracle.

1696.chinese_text: 如果我能把这棵植物带回家，那我的花园一定会增色不少。
1696.english_text: If I could take this plant home, my garden would certainly look much better.

1697.chinese_text: 这棵植物的像素边缘太粗糙了，看来我该去升级一下显卡了。
1697.english_text: The pixel edges are too rough; looks like I need to upgrade my graphics card.

1698.chinese_text: 看着这棵植物，我突然有种想去画画的冲动，可是我不会画画。
1698.english_text: Looking at this plant gives me a sudden urge to paint, but I don’t know how.

1699.chinese_text: 也许这棵植物是一个迷宫的入口，我要是能找到进去的方法就好了。
1699.english_text: Maybe this plant is a maze entrance; if only I could find a way in.

1700.chinese_text: 这粉红色的树冠，怎么越看越像是一个人的脑袋，真是太可怕了。
1700.english_text: The more I look at this pink canopy, the more it looks like a human head—how terrifying.

1701.chinese_text: 这片灌木丛看起来好青翠，充满了生机。
1701.english_text: This patch of bushes looks so lush and full of life.

1702.chinese_text: 不知道这茂密的枝叶里有没有藏着什么秘密？
1702.english_text: I wonder if there are any secrets hidden within these thick leaves?

1703.chinese_text: 夏天在这里乘凉应该很不错，肯定很阴凉。
1703.english_text: It would be great to enjoy the shade here in summer; it must be very cool.

1704.chinese_text: 风吹过，树叶沙沙作响，仿佛在低语。
1704.english_text: The wind blows, and the leaves rustle as if they are whispering.

1705.chinese_text: 这些灌木长得可真快，没几天就长这么大了。
1705.english_text: These bushes grow so fast; they’ve gotten this big in just a few days.

1706.chinese_text: 我得小心，别被这些尖锐的枝条刮伤了。
1706.english_text: I have to be careful not to get scratched by these sharp twigs.

1707.chinese_text: 看看这些叶子，每一片都有独特的纹理。
1707.english_text: Look at these leaves; every single one has a unique texture.

1708.chinese_text: 也许我能在树叶下找到一些奇特的昆虫。
1708.english_text: Maybe I can find some peculiar insects under the leaves.

1709.chinese_text: 这块区域的灌木丛比其他地方都要茂盛得多。
1709.english_text: The bushes in this area are much more lush than anywhere else.

1710.chinese_text: 感觉这里是个捉迷藏的好地方，不容易被发现。
1710.english_text: This feels like a great spot for hide-and-seek, not easy to be found.

1711.chinese_text: 这些花朵雖然小，但点缀在绿叶间格外美丽。
1711.english_text: Though the flowers are small, they look exceptionally beautiful nestled among the green leaves.

1712.chinese_text: 这片灌木丛好像需要修剪一下了，有些乱。
1712.english_text: This patch of bushes seems to need a bit of trimming; it's a bit messy.

1713.chinese_text: 如果我是一只小鸟，我一定会把窝筑在这里。
1713.english_text: If I were a little bird, I would definitely build my nest here.

1714.chinese_text: 不知道这些灌木是不是有人专门种植的？
1714.english_text: I wonder if these bushes were specifically planted by someone?

1715.chinese_text: 清晨的露珠停留在叶面上，晶莹剔透。
1715.english_text: The morning dew rests on the leaves, crystal clear.

1716.chinese_text: 这里不仅美丽，而且给人一种宁静的感觉。
1716.english_text: It’s not just beautiful here; it also gives off a sense of tranquility.

1717.chinese_text: 我能闻到淡淡的青草和泥土的芬芳。
1717.english_text: I can smell the faint fragrance of grass and earth.

1718.chinese_text: 这些灌木丛是野生动物的天然庇护所。
1718.english_text: These bushes are a natural sanctuary for wildlife.

1719.chinese_text: 看着它们茁壮成长，心情也会变好。
1719.english_text: Watching them grow vigorously really improves my mood.

1720.chinese_text: 这不仅仅是植物，它们也是这个世界的一部分。
1720.english_text: These aren't just plants; they are a part of this world.

1721.chinese_text: 这堆枯草堵在这里真碍事，得找个法子清理掉。
1721.english_text: This pile of dead grass is such an obstacle; I need to find a way to clear it.

1722.chinese_text: 看起来干巴巴的，一点生机都没有，是缺水了吗？
1722.english_text: It looks so dry and lifeless; is it lacking water?

1723.chinese_text: 哎呀，小心别被这些尖尖的枯枝扎到了。
1723.english_text: Oops, be careful not to get pricked by these sharp dead branches.

1724.chinese_text: 这里的草怎么都是金黄色的，是因为秋天到了吗？
1724.english_text: Why is the grass all golden here? Is it because autumn has arrived?

1725.chinese_text: 这团灌木丛长得可真结实，像个小堡垒似的。
1725.english_text: This cluster of bushes has grown so dense, it's like a little fortress.

1726.chinese_text: 闻起来有一股淡淡的干草香味，还挺好闻的。
1726.english_text: It has a faint scent of dry hay; it’s actually quite nice.

1727.chinese_text: 里面会不会藏着什么宝贝或者小动物呢？真想掏掏看。
1727.english_text: Could there be some treasure or small animals inside? I really want to dig around.

1728.chinese_text: 这颜色，在这一片绿意中显得格外显眼啊。
1728.english_text: This color really stands out amidst all the greenery.

1729.chinese_text: 感觉这就是个天然的藏身处，躲在后面肯定没人能发现。
1729.english_text: This feels like a natural hiding spot; no one would find me back there.

1730.chinese_text: 唉，这如果是金子做的灌木该多好啊。
1730.english_text: Ah, if only this were a bush made of gold.

1731.chinese_text: 这灌木丛看着死气沉沉的，是不是生病了？
1731.english_text: This bush looks lifeless; could it be diseased?

1732.chinese_text: 这么大一坨，要是能一把火烧了肯定很壮观（还是算了吧）。
1732.english_text: Such a big mass; it would be quite a sight if I set it on fire (better not, though).

1733.chinese_text: 这玩意儿挡住了我欣赏风景的视线。
1733.english_text: This thing is blocking my view of the scenery.

1734.chinese_text: 看起来像个巨大的刺猬，碰都碰不得。
1734.english_text: It looks like a giant hedgehog; I shouldn't even touch it.

1735.chinese_text: 阳光照在上面，闪闪发光的，还挺好看。
1735.english_text: With the sunlight on it, it’s all shimmering—looks pretty good.

1736.chinese_text: 这里以前是不是发生过什么，才让这灌木长成这样？
1736.english_text: Did something happen here in the past to make this bush grow like this?

1737.chinese_text: 这么大一个，得有多少根枯枝编织在一起啊。
1737.english_text: It's so huge; I wonder how many dead branches are woven together.

1738.chinese_text: 感觉这草丛里有什么东西在动，错觉吗？
1738.english_text: I feel like something is moving in the grass—is it just my imagination?

1739.chinese_text: 哎，要是能把这颜色染回绿色就好了。
1739.english_text: Ah, if only I could dye this back to green.

1740.chinese_text: 这就是一个普通的枯草堆，没什么特别的，走吧。
1740.english_text: It’s just an ordinary pile of dead grass; nothing special, let’s go.

1741.chinese_text: 哎呀，好香的爆米花味儿！
1741.english_text: Oh, the smell of popcorn is so good!

1742.chinese_text: 这个红色的桶真显眼啊。
1742.english_text: This red bucket is really eye-catching.

1744.chinese_text: 闻到这个味道我就走不动路了。
1744.english_text: I can't move once I catch a whiff of this scent.

1745.chinese_text: 这桶爆米花看起来满满当当的。
1745.english_text: This bucket of popcorn looks like it’s filled to the brim.

1746.chinese_text: 我打赌这里的爆米花是甜的。
1746.english_text: I bet the popcorn here is sweet.

1747.english_text: I really want to take a huge bite.

1748.chinese_text: 这个红白条纹的桶让我想起了马戏团。
1748.english_text: This red and white striped bucket reminds me of the circus.

1749.chinese_text: 这种桶装的爆米花最适合看电影了。
1749.english_text: This kind of bucketed popcorn is perfect for watching movies.

1750.chinese_text: 这颜色，看着就让人开心。
1750.english_text: This color just makes people feel happy.

1751.chinese_text: 这里怎么会有一桶爆米花？
1751.english_text: Why is there a bucket of popcorn here?

1752.chinese_text: 它是热的吗？我想伸手摸摸。
1752.english_text: Is it hot? I want to reach out and touch it.

1754.chinese_text: 这么一大桶，我一个人吃不完吧。
1754.english_text: Such a huge bucket, I probably can't finish it alone.

1755.english_text: This red bucket is a real classic.

1756.chinese_text: 不知道这爆米花有没有加黄油。
1756.english_text: I wonder if this popcorn has butter added.

1757.chinese_text: 爆米花真是伟大的发明。
1757.english_text: Popcorn is truly a great invention.

1758.chinese_text: 一看到这个，我就想起了快乐的时光。
1758.english_text: Seeing this reminds me of happy times.

1759.chinese_text: 嗯...这味道真是太诱人了。
1759.english_text: Hmm... this scent is just so tempting.

1760.chinese_text: 这一桶爆米花，足够我吃好久了。
1760.english_text: This bucket of popcorn will last me a long time.

1761.chinese_text: 哎呀，好香的味道，是刚出锅的爆米花！
1761.english_text: Oh, what a delicious smell, it's fresh popcorn!

1762.chinese_text: 这个蓝色的纸袋子，看起来好复古啊。
1762.english_text: This blue paper bag looks so retro.

1763.chinese_text: 红蓝条纹，这配色让我想起了老电影院。
1763.english_text: Red and blue stripes, this color scheme reminds me of old cinemas.

1764.chinese_text: 满满的一袋子，看起来很实惠。
1764.english_text: A full bag, it looks like a great deal.

1765.chinese_text: 里面的爆米花金灿灿的，一定很酥脆。
1765.english_text: The popcorn inside is golden and must be very crunchy.

1766.chinese_text: 闻着这股奶油味，肚子都咕咕叫了。
1766.english_text: Smelling this buttery scent makes my stomach growl.

1767.chinese_text: 不知道是甜的还是咸的？或者是焦糖的？
1767.english_text: I wonder if it’s sweet or salty? Or maybe caramel?

1768.chinese_text: 这种颗粒状的感觉，真是像素风的极致体现。
1768.english_text: This grainy texture is the ultimate expression of pixel art.

1769.chinese_text: 带上一袋去冒险，路上肯定不会无聊。
1769.english_text: Taking a bag on an adventure means it definitely won't be boring.

1770.chinese_text: 这是看戏时的标配啊，怎么这里也有？
1770.english_text: This is standard for watching a show, why is it here too?

1771.chinese_text: 感觉这就是那个神秘商人卖的货。
1771.english_text: It feels like something the mysterious merchant would sell.

1772.chinese_text: 这么一大袋，我一个人肯定吃不完。
1772.english_text: Such a big bag, I definitely can't eat it all by myself.

1773.chinese_text: 里面的爆米花好像都在闪闪发光呢。
1773.english_text: The popcorn inside seems to be shimmering.

1774.chinese_text: 看着这个袋子，就想起了小时候的事情。
1774.english_text: Looking at this bag brings back childhood memories.

1775.chinese_text: 价格应该不便宜吧，毕竟是高级货。
1775.english_text: It probably isn't cheap, after all, it's a premium item.

1776.chinese_text: 这里面会不会藏着什么特别的道具？
1776.english_text: Could there be some special item hidden inside?

1777.chinese_text: 爆米花这种东西，怎么看都很诱人。
1777.english_text: Popcorn just looks tempting no matter how you look at it.

1778.chinese_text: 这个蓝色的袋子，真是越看越顺眼。
1778.english_text: This blue bag is starting to look better and better the more I see it.

1779.chinese_text: 要是能加点巧克力酱就更完美了。
1779.english_text: It would be even more perfect if some chocolate sauce could be added.

1780.chinese_text: 算了，还是先不买，等会儿再回来看看。
1780.english_text: Never mind, I'll hold off for now and check back later.

1781.chinese_text: 这个看台虽然看起来有点旧，但坐在上面视野还是挺不错的。
1781.english_text: This stand might look a bit old, but the view from it is actually quite good.

1782.chinese_text: 我记得上次比赛的时候，整个看台都坐满了人，大家都非常激动。
1782.english_text: I remember during the last match, the whole stand was packed, and everyone was so excited.

1783.chinese_text: 比赛快开始了，得赶紧找个好位置坐下来。
1783.english_text: The match is about to start; better find a good seat quickly.

1784.chinese_text: 这些五颜六色的座椅，让整个看台看起来都很有活力。
1784.english_text: These colorful seats make the entire stand look very vibrant.

1785.chinese_text: 这个看台的设计非常实用，可以让观众看清楚比赛的每一个细节。
1785.english_text: The design of this stand is very practical, allowing spectators to see every detail of the match.

1786.chinese_text: 我喜欢坐在最上面一排，这样可以俯瞰整个赛场。
1786.english_text: I like sitting in the top row so I can overlook the entire field.

1787.chinese_text: 虽然看台有点高，但我觉得还是挺安全的。
1787.english_text: Although the stand is a bit high, I think it’s quite safe.

1788.chinese_text: 这些座椅看起来很舒适，应该可以坐很久。
1788.english_text: These seats look comfortable; I should be able to sit for a long time.

1789.chinese_text: 比赛结束了，大家都依依不舍地离开了看台。
1789.english_text: The match is over, and everyone is reluctantly leaving the stand.

1790.chinese_text: 这个看台是整个体育场的重要组成部分，它见证了无数精彩的比赛。
1790.english_text: This stand is an essential part of the stadium, witnessing countless brilliant matches.

1791.chinese_text: 我记得有一场比赛，看台上的观众为他们的队伍加油助威，声音非常大。
1791.english_text: I remember a match where the fans in the stands cheered for their team so loudly.

1792.chinese_text: 看台上的气氛总是非常热烈，让人感到兴奋。
1792.english_text: The atmosphere in the stands is always very intense and exciting.

1793.chinese_text: 虽然这个看台不是最新的，但我觉得它还是很有魅力的。
1793.english_text: Even though this stand isn't the newest, I still find it quite charming.

1794.chinese_text: 比赛中，看台上的观众会为每一个精彩的瞬间而欢呼。
1794.english_text: During the match, the audience in the stands cheers for every brilliant moment.

1795.chinese_text: 这个看台的位置非常好，可以让观众看清楚比赛。
1795.english_text: This stand is positioned perfectly, giving spectators a clear view of the match.

1796.chinese_text: 这些五颜六色的座椅，让看台看起来非常有活力。
1796.english_text: These colorful seats make the stand look full of energy.

1797.chinese_text: 比赛中，看台上的观众会为他们的队伍加油助威。
1797.english_text: Spectators in the stands will be cheering for their teams during the match.

1798.chinese_text: 这个看台虽然看起来有点旧，但坐在上面视野还是挺不错的。
1798.english_text: This stand might be a bit old, but the view from it is still quite good.

1799.chinese_text: 我记得上次比赛的时候，整个看台都坐满了人，大家都非常激动。
1799.english_text: I remember the last match when the stands were full and everyone was so thrilled.

1800.chinese_text: 这个看台的设计非常实用，可以让观众看清楚比赛的每一个细节。
1800.english_text: The practical design of this stand ensures spectators can catch every detail of the match.

1801.chinese_text: 这椅子太硬了，坐久了屁股肯定痛
1801.english_text: This chair is too hard; my butt is definitely going to hurt if I sit for too long.

1802.chinese_text: 这个位置视野不错，正对着场地中央
1802.english_text: This spot has a good view, right in front of the center of the field.

1803.chinese_text: 又是只有一把椅子？总觉得哪里怪怪的
1803.english_text: Just one chair again? Something feels off about this.

1804.chinese_text: 这绿油油的颜色，和看台的风格不太搭啊
1804.english_text: This bright green color doesn't really match the style of the stands.

1805.chinese_text: 看这磨损程度，肯定是有人经常坐在这里
1805.english_text: Judging by the wear and tear, someone must sit here often.

1806.chinese_text: 为什么这椅子不能移动？好想要一把能搬动的椅子
1806.english_text: Why is this chair fixed? I really wish I had one I could move.

1807.chinese_text: 下次一定要带个垫子来，不然这椅子根本没法坐
1807.english_text: Definitely need to bring a cushion next time, otherwise this chair is unbearable.

1808.chinese_text: 旁边要是再多几把椅子就好了，这样大家就能一起坐了
1808.english_text: It would be nice if there were more chairs around so everyone could sit together.

1809.chinese_text: 这把椅子的靠背好像有点矮，靠着不舒服
1809.english_text: The backrest of this chair seems a bit low; it's not very comfortable.

1810.chinese_text: 这是专门为 VIP 准备的座位吗？看起来比其他的要好一点
1810.english_text: Is this a seat reserved for VIPs? It looks a bit better than the others.

1811.chinese_text: 怎么只有这一把椅子是这个颜色的？太显眼了吧
1811.english_text: Why is only this one chair this color? It’s way too striking.

1812.chinese_text: 坐在这里看比赛，一定很刺激！
1812.english_text: Watching a match from here must be really exciting!

1813.chinese_text: 这椅子的材质感觉很廉价，塑料感满满
1813.english_text: The material of this chair feels cheap, very plasticky.

1814.chinese_text: 不知道这把椅子能承受多少重量
1814.english_text: I wonder how much weight this chair can hold.

1815.chinese_text: 要是这把椅子能折叠就好了，这样就能节省空间
1815.english_text: If only this chair could fold; that would save so much space.

1816.chinese_text: 这里视野虽然好，但是离赛场太远了
1816.english_text: The view is good here, but it's too far from the action.

1817.chinese_text: 为什么这把椅子看起来这么孤独？
1817.english_text: Why does this chair look so lonely?

1818.chinese_text: 这把椅子放在这里，真的有人会去坐吗？
1818.english_text: This chair is placed here, but will anyone actually sit in it?

1819.chinese_text: 看起来挺干净的，应该刚有人擦过
1819.english_text: It looks pretty clean; someone must have just wiped it.

1820.chinese_text: 这椅子好像没什么特别的，就是普通看台椅子
1820.english_text: This chair doesn't seem like anything special, just an ordinary stadium seat.

1821.chinese_text: 这红椅子真显眼，看来是比赛的好位置。
1821.english_text: This red chair is so eye-catching; looks like a prime spot for the match.

1822.chinese_text: 呼，站累了，在这儿坐一会儿没人看见吧。
1822.english_text: Phew, I'm tired of standing; no one will notice if I sit here for a bit, right?

1823.chinese_text: 听说决赛那天，只有大人物才能坐这把椅子。
1823.english_text: I heard only VIPs get to sit in this chair on the day of the finals.

1824.chinese_text: 这里视野不错，正好能看到整个竞技场。
1824.english_text: The view is great here, you can see the entire arena perfectly.

1825.chinese_text: 每次看到空椅子，就想起那些没能回来的勇士。
1825.english_text: Every time I see an empty chair, it reminds me of the heroes who didn't make it back.

1826.chinese_text: 这椅子好像擦得挺干净，不像那边的。
1826.english_text: This chair seems to be wiped clean, unlike the ones over there.

1827.chinese_text: 等比赛开始了，这里肯定坐满了人。
1827.english_text: Once the match starts, this place will definitely be packed.

1828.chinese_text: 上次有个人在这里激动的把椅子都喊裂了。
1828.english_text: Last time, someone was so excited they shouted until the chair cracked.

1829.chinese_text: 真想就在这儿睡一觉，风真舒服。
1829.english_text: I really just want to take a nap here; the breeze is so pleasant.

1830.chinese_text: 这是留给勇者你的位置，请坐吧。
1830.english_text: This seat is reserved for you, Brave One. Please, take a seat.

1831.chinese_text: 这里不收费，随便坐，只要比赛还没开始。
1831.english_text: There’s no charge here; feel free to sit as long as the match hasn't started.

1832.chinese_text: 坐在家里和坐在看台，感觉完全不同啊。
1832.english_text: Sitting at home and sitting in the stands—it's a completely different feeling.

1833.chinese_text: 有没有人注意，我在这把椅子下藏了个铜币？
1833.english_text: Did anyone notice I hid a copper coin under this chair?

1834.chinese_text: 唉，这看台真硬，坐久了屁股疼。
1834.english_text: Ugh, these stands are so hard; my butt hurts after sitting too long.

1835.chinese_text: 阳光正好晒在椅子的靠背上，暖洋洋的。
1835.english_text: The sun is shining right on the back of the chair, so warm and cozy.

1836.chinese_text: 这看台上的椅子，见证了多少胜负。
1836.english_text: The chairs in these stands have witnessed so many victories and defeats.

1837.chinese_text: 小心点坐，这椅子看起来不太稳当。
1837.english_text: Sit carefully; this chair doesn't look very stable.

1838.chinese_text: 等会儿要把这整排椅子都擦一遍，真是个苦差事。
1838.english_text: Having to wipe down this whole row of chairs later is going to be such a chore.

1839.chinese_text: 站在这里看比赛，不如坐下来享受。
1839.english_text: Rather than standing to watch the match, better to sit and enjoy.

1840.chinese_text: 这红色，真像是胜利者的鲜血啊。
1840.english_text: This red color... it really looks like the blood of a victor.

1841.chinese_text: 哎呀，这里的看台椅子看起来可不太舒服。
1841.english_text: Oh boy, these stadium seats don't look very comfortable.

1842.chinese_text: 这看台上的椅子，颜色真鲜艳，像块糖果。
1842.english_text: The chairs in these stands are so brightly colored, like pieces of candy.

1843.chinese_text: 不知道坐在上面能不能看到精彩的比赛。
1843.english_text: I wonder if sitting here will give a good view of the match.

1844.chinese_text: 这种塑料椅子，夏天坐上去一定烫屁股。
1844.english_text: These plastic chairs are bound to be burning hot in the summer.

1845.chinese_text: 这椅子看起来有些年头了，说不定有什么故事。
1845.english_text: This chair looks quite old; maybe it has a story to tell.

1846.chinese_text: 为什么这里的看台椅子都是蓝色的？
1846.english_text: Why are all the stadium seats here blue?

1847.chinese_text: 这看台椅子，让我想起了小时候在操场上的时候。
1847.english_text: These seats remind me of my time on the school playground as a kid.

1848.chinese_text: 如果能在这里看一场足球赛，感觉一定不错。
1848.english_text: It would probably feel great to watch a football match from here.

1849.chinese_text: 这椅子看起来不太结实，我还是别坐了。
1849.english_text: This chair doesn't look very sturdy; I think I'll skip sitting in it.

1850.chinese_text: 这排看台椅子，整整齐齐地排列着。
1850.english_text: This row of stadium seats is arranged so neatly.

1851.chinese_text: 这里的看台椅子，好像是专门为观众准备的。
1851.english_text: The seats here seem to be specifically prepared for the spectators.

1852.chinese_text: 这看台椅子，虽然普通，但却承载了无数人的欢乐。
1852.english_text: Though ordinary, these seats have held the joy of countless people.

1853.chinese_text: 我要是能带走一把就好了，家里正好缺把椅子。
1853.english_text: I wish I could take one with me; my place is short of a chair.

1854.chinese_text: 这椅子下面，是不是藏着什么秘密？
1854.english_text: Is there something secret hidden under this chair?

1855.chinese_text: 看这椅子，我就能想象出以前热闹的场景。
1855.english_text: Just looking at these chairs, I can imagine the lively scenes of the past.

1856.chinese_text: 这看台椅子，被风吹雨打，已经有些褪色了。
1856.english_text: Weathered by wind and rain, these stadium seats have faded a bit.

1857.chinese_text: 虽然看起来不起眼，但也是不可或缺的一部分。
1857.english_text: Though seemingly insignificant, they are an indispensable part.

1858.chinese_text: 这椅子让我想起了青春，那个时候我也在这里坐过。
1858.english_text: This chair reminds me of my youth; I used to sit here back then, too.

1859.chinese_text: 不知道下次这里有什么活动。
1859.english_text: I wonder what event will be held here next.

1860.chinese_text: 这看台椅子，就像一个静静的观察者。
1860.english_text: These stadium seats are like silent observers.

1861.chinese_text: 这椅子看起来还挺干净的，比起别的强多了。
1861.english_text: This chair looks pretty clean, much better than the others.

1862.chinese_text: 这看台，平时也没几个人，摆这么多椅子干嘛。
1862.english_text: There’s hardly anyone here usually; why bother with so many chairs?

1863.chinese_text: 颜色倒挺鲜艳，像个新鲜的橘子。
1863.english_text: The color is quite vibrant, like a fresh orange.

1864.chinese_text: 这种椅子坐久了，屁股肯定疼得要命。
1864.english_text: Sitting in this kind of chair for long will definitely make your butt hurt like crazy.

1865.chinese_text: 坐在这里视野倒是不错，能看清整个赛场。
1865.english_text: Sitting here gives a decent view; you can see the whole field clearly.

1866.chinese_text: 这椅子稳当吗？感觉随时都会散架一样。
1866.english_text: Is this chair stable? It feels like it could fall apart at any moment.

1867.chinese_text: 这里以前是不是坐过什么重要人物啊？
1867.english_text: Did someone important sit here in the past?

1868.chinese_text: 真希望它能变成那种带靠垫的豪华真皮座椅。
1868.english_text: I really wish it could turn into one of those luxury leather seats with cushions.

1869.chinese_text: 这种硬塑料椅子最讨厌了，夏天烫屁股，冬天冰屁股。
1869.english_text: These hard plastic chairs are the worst—burning hot in summer, freezing in winter.

1870.chinese_text: 这是专门给VIP预留的吗？怎么没人坐。
1870.english_text: Is this reserved for VIPs? Why is no one sitting here?

1871.chinese_text: 这里的灰尘也太重了吧，谁来打扫一下啊。
1871.english_text: The dust here is way too thick; can someone come and clean it?

1872.chinese_text: 这椅子下面是不是藏了什么秘密信息？
1872.english_text: Is there some secret message hidden under this chair?

1873.chinese_text: 每次看到这种椅子，我就想起以前看比赛的日子。
1873.english_text: Every time I see a chair like this, I think back to the days of watching matches.

1874.chinese_text: 这椅子是谁设计的，真是一点人体工学都不讲。
1874.english_text: Who designed this chair? It shows absolutely no regard for ergonomics.

1875.chinese_text: 要是这椅子能自动调整高度就好了。
1875.english_text: It would be great if this chair could automatically adjust its height.

1876.chinese_text: 这里是全场最佳观赛点吗？感觉不出来。
1876.english_text: Is this the best viewing spot in the house? I don't really feel it.

1877.chinese_text: 这椅子的颜色真是太扎眼了，离老远就能看见。
1877.english_text: The color of this chair is so eye-piercing; you can see it from a mile away.

1878.chinese_text: 这个位置，要是下雨，估计要被淋成落汤鸡。
1878.english_text: If it rains here, you'll probably end up soaked like a drowned rat.

1879.chinese_text: 看来这里是为那些不喜欢热闹的人准备的。
1879.english_text: Looks like this spot is for those who don't like crowds.

1880.chinese_text: 这椅子，真的是让人一点坐下的欲望都没有。
1880.english_text: This chair really gives you absolutely no desire to sit down.

1881.chinese_text: 这花坛里的土看着好干，得赶紧浇水了
1881.english_text: The soil in this planter looks so dry; it needs watering immediately.

1882.chinese_text: 实木的花坛，这木头纹理还挺别致
1882.english_text: A solid wood planter—the wood grain is actually quite unique.

1883.chinese_text: 如果把这个花坛放在我家门前，肯定很漂亮
1883.english_text: This planter would look beautiful right in front of my house.

1884.chinese_text: 这个花坛的侧面看着挺扎实
1884.english_text: The side of this planter looks quite solid.

1885.chinese_text: 这个高度正适合种些矮牵牛
1885.english_text: This height is perfect for planting some petunias.

1886.chinese_text: 不知道这土里有没有藏着什么宝贝
1886.english_text: I wonder if there's any treasure hidden in this soil.

1887.chinese_text: 每天照顾这些花花草草，心情都变好了
1887.english_text: Taking care of these plants every day really brightens my mood.

1888.chinese_text: 哎，这木头有点裂了，得修补一下
1888.english_text: Ah, the wood is starting to crack; it needs some repairs.

1889.chinese_text: 这个实木花坛做工还真精细
1889.english_text: The craftsmanship of this solid wood planter is truly delicate.

1890.chinese_text: 这花坛里的土还真深，能种不少东西
1890.english_text: The soil in this planter is quite deep; it could grow a lot of things.

1891.chinese_text: 看起来可以种些草药，比如薰衣草或迷迭香
1891.english_text: Looks like I could plant some herbs, like lavender or rosemary.

1892.chinese_text: 实木的味道真好闻，让人感到很放松
1892.english_text: The scent of solid wood is so pleasant and relaxing.

1893.chinese_text: 这花坛的造型不错，很有设计感
1893.english_text: The shape of this planter is nice; it has a real sense of design.

1894.chinese_text: 不知道这土是不是专门配制的营养土
1894.english_text: I wonder if this soil is a specially formulated potting mix.

1895.chinese_text: 把这个花坛放在院子里，肯定能增添不少生机
1895.english_text: Putting this planter in the yard would definitely add a lot of life.

1896.chinese_text: 这里面可以种些可以驱虫的植物
1896.english_text: You could plant some insect-repelling plants in here.

1897.chinese_text: 这里的土质看起来不错，应该适合大多数植物
1897.english_text: The soil quality here looks good, probably suitable for most plants.

1898.chinese_text: 这花坛虽然小，但功能还挺齐全
1898.english_text: Though small, this planter is quite functional.

1899.chinese_text: 这木头不知道防水吗，得小心点
1899.english_text: I’m not sure if this wood is waterproof; better be careful.

1900.chinese_text: 每天在这里散散步，看着这些花草，感觉整个人都年轻了
1900.english_text: Strolling here every day and looking at these plants makes me feel younger.

1901.chinese_text: 这就是那座传说中的足球门吗？看起来真壮观啊！
1901.english_text: Is this the legendary football goal? It looks truly magnificent!

1902.chinese_text: 这里曾是无数英雄挥洒汗水的地方吧。
1902.english_text: This must be where countless heroes shed their sweat.

1903.chinese_text: 如果我能在这里踢一场球，那该多好啊。
1903.english_text: How wonderful it would be if I could play a match here.

1904.chinese_text: 这个球门看起来很坚固，一定能承受得住猛烈的射门。
1904.english_text: This goal looks very sturdy; it can surely withstand powerful shots.

1905.chinese_text: 每次看到这个球门，我都忍不住想拿起球大干一场。
1905.english_text: Every time I see this goal, I can’t help but want to grab a ball and start playing.

1906.chinese_text: 这个球门见证了无数精彩的进球瞬间，真是太棒了！
1906.english_text: This goal has witnessed countless brilliant scoring moments; it’s amazing!

1907.chinese_text: 这就是梦想开始的地方，也是汗水凝聚的地方。
1907.english_text: This is where dreams begin and where sweat culminates.

1908.chinese_text: 这个球门不仅仅是一个运动设施，它更是荣耀的象征。
1908.english_text: This goal is more than just a sports facility; it’s a symbol of glory.

1909.chinese_text: 每次站在这个球门前，我都能感受到一股力量在涌动。
1909.english_text: Every time I stand before this goal, I can feel a surge of power within me.

1910.chinese_text: 这个球门是球场上的终极目标，也是胜利的象征。
1910.english_text: This goal is the ultimate objective on the field and a sign of victory.

1911.chinese_text: 这个球门见证了无数个激动人心的时刻，它永远闪耀着光芒。
1911.english_text: This goal has witnessed countless exciting moments; it will always shine bright.

1912.chinese_text: 这里不仅仅是足球运动员的梦想，也是每一个爱球之人的梦想。
1912.english_text: This isn’t just a dream for football players, but for every football lover too.

1913.chinese_text: 这个球门不仅代表着胜利，更代表着团队合作的精神。
1913.english_text: This goal represents more than victory; it embodies the spirit of teamwork.

1914.chinese_text: 这里的草坪、这里的球门，都是我一生的追求。
1914.english_text: This turf and this goal—they are what I’ve been pursuing all my life.

1915.chinese_text: 每次站在这个球门前，我都感到一种无法言喻的自豪感。
1915.english_text: Every time I stand before this goal, I feel an indescribable sense of pride.

1916.chinese_text: 这里不仅是足球场上的终点，更是梦想起航的起点。
1916.english_text: This is not just the finish line on the field, but the starting point of dreams.

1917.chinese_text: 这个球门不仅代表着荣耀，更代表着汗水 and 付出。
1917.english_text: This goal stands for more than glory; it represents sweat and dedication.

1918.chinese_text: 每次看到这个球门，我都忍不住想起那些曾经在球场上奋斗的日子。
1918.english_text: Seeing this goal always makes me look back on the days of struggling on the pitch.

1919.chinese_text: 这个球门见证了无数个伟大的时刻，它永远是我们心中的一座丰碑。
1919.english_text: This goal has witnessed countless great moments; it will always be a monument in our hearts.

1920.chinese_text: 这里的足球门不仅仅是一个运动设施，它更是我们心中的信仰和荣耀。
1920.english_text: This football goal is more than a sports fixture; it is our faith and our glory.

1921.chinese_text: 这里的球门见证了传奇的诞生！或者只是我一直丢球的地方……
1921.english_text: This is the goal where legends are made! Or just where I keep losing balls...

1922.chinese_text: 那像素风格的结构看起来很坚固，准备好挡住任何射门了！
1922.english_text: That pixelated structure looks sturdy, ready to stop any shot!

1923.chinese_text: 球网已经挂好，看起来比赛就要开始了。
1923.english_text: The nets are up, looks like a match is about to start.

1924.chinese_text: 总有一天，我会像贝克汉姆一样把球踢进那个网窝！
1924.english_text: One day, I'll bend it like Beckham right into that net!

1925.chinese_text: 站在这个球门前，我已经能听到人群的欢呼声了！
1925.english_text: Standing in front of this goal, I can already hear the roar of the crowd!

1926.chinese_text: 那个红色的框架……是标准配备，还是什么特别的东西？
1926.english_text: That red frame... Is it standard issue, or something special?

1927.chinese_text: 就在这儿，一个经典的守门员噩梦。
1927.english_text: A classic goalkeeper's nightmare, right here.

1928.chinese_text: 练习点球的完美场所。咱们去找个足球吧！
1928.english_text: Perfect for practicing penalties. Let's find a football!

1929.chinese_text: 这个球门经历过更好的时光，球网看起来有点像素化了！
1929.english_text: This goal has seen better days, the net is looking a bit pixelated!

1930.chinese_text: 白红相间的设计虽然简单，却是标志性的。
1930.english_text: The white-and-red design is simple but iconic.

1931.chinese_text: 如果我能从这里踢进去，那我在哪儿都能得分！
1931.english_text: If I can kick it from here, I can score anywhere!

1932.chinese_text: 球员们都在哪儿？这个球门看起来好孤独。
1932.english_text: Where are the players? This goal looks lonely.

1933.chinese_text: 那球网看起来好像会被强力射门给撕裂！
1933.english_text: That netting looks like it might rip with a powerful shot!

1934.chinese_text: 该轮到我当守门员了。我的手套在哪儿？
1934.english_text: Time to play goalkeeper. Where's my gloves?

1935.chinese_text: 我想知道最后一个在这个球门得分的球员是谁。
1935.english_text: I wonder who was the last player to score in this very goal.

1936.chinese_text: 仅仅看着这个球门就让我热血沸腾！
1936.english_text: Just watching this goal gives me football fever!

1937.chinese_text: 我真希望有个球来测试一下这个守门员的防御！
1937.english_text: I wish I had a ball to test this keeper's defense!

1938.chinese_text: 它可能很简单，但对于任何足球场来说都是必不可少的！
1938.english_text: It might be simple, but it's essential for any football pitch!

1939.chinese_text: 看着这个球门，我想看一场像素艺术风格的体育比赛！
1939.english_text: Looking at this goal makes me want to watch a pixel art sports tournament!

1940.chinese_text: 我可以在这里待上一整天，就在想象中不停地进球。
1940.english_text: I could spend all day here, just shooting goals in my imagination.

1941.chinese_text: 这栏杆真结实，看来这里关着什么重要的东西。
1941.english_text: This fence is so sturdy; it looks like something important is being kept in here.

1942.chinese_text: 铁栅栏把路挡住了，得找个别的办法过去。
1942.english_text: The iron fence is blocking the path; I’ll have to find another way around.

1943.chinese_text: 又是这该死的栏杆，总是出现在不该出现的地方。
1943.english_text: These damn bars again, always popping up where they shouldn't be.

1944.chinese_text: 我能听到栅栏后面有什么声音，但我不想过去看。
1944.english_text: I can hear some noise behind the fence, but I don't really want to check it out.

1945.chinese_text: 这个栅栏看起来很古老，也许它以前是保护什么的。
1945.english_text: This fence looks quite ancient; maybe it used to protect something.

1946.chinese_text: 为什么这里会有铁栅栏？这里有什么秘密吗？
1946.english_text: Why is there an iron fence here? Is there some secret?

1947.chinese_text: 铁栅栏上沾满了灰尘，看来已经很久没人维护了。
1947.english_text: The bars are covered in dust; it hasn't been maintained for a long time.

1948.chinese_text: 我想知道如果没有这栏杆，我会去哪里。
1948.english_text: I wonder where I’d go if these bars weren't here.

1949.chinese_text: 这个铁栅栏真的很妨碍我，我要找工具把它拆了。
1949.english_text: This iron fence is really getting in my way; I need tools to tear it down.

1950.chinese_text: 栅栏后面的世界看起来和这边一样，没有什么区别。
1950.english_text: The world behind the fence looks just like this side—no difference at all.

1951.chinese_text: 这铁栅栏提醒我，有些东西是不能触碰的。
1951.english_text: This iron fence reminds me that some things are just off-limits.

1952.chinese_text: 为什么有人会想在家里装铁栅栏？这太奇怪了。
1952.english_text: Why would anyone want an iron fence in their home? That's so weird.

1953.chinese_text: 我觉得我可以用我的技能把这栏杆撬开。
1953.english_text: I think I can use my skills to pry these bars open.

1954.chinese_text: 这铁栅栏真碍眼，它把这么好的风景都挡住了。
1954.english_text: This iron fence is such an eyesore; it's blocking such a great view.

1955.chinese_text: 我能感觉到铁栅栏上传来的寒意，我不喜欢这里。
1955.english_text: I can feel a chill coming from the iron fence; I don't like it here.

1956.chinese_text: 这铁栅栏太高了，我爬不过去，只能另想办法。
1956.english_text: This fence is too high to climb over; I’ll have to find another solution.

1957.chinese_text: 为什么这里有铁栅栏？难道这里有什么危险的东西吗？
1957.english_text: Why is there a fence here? Is there something dangerous around?

1958.chinese_text: 我希望这铁栅栏只是个装饰，而不是真正的阻碍。
1958.english_text: I hope this iron fence is just for decoration and not a real obstacle.

1959.chinese_text: 这铁栅栏真是一个麻烦，它让我感到很烦躁。
1959.english_text: This iron fence is such a nuisance; it’s really getting on my nerves.

1960.chinese_text: 铁栅栏让我想起了一些不好的回忆。
1960.english_text: The iron fence brings back some unpleasant memories.

1961.chinese_text: 这道铁网栅栏，是为了挡住我也好，还是为了把我挡在里面也好，对我来说，都是一样的。
1961.english_text: Whether this chain-link fence is meant to keep me out or lock me in, it's all the same to me.

1962.chinese_text: 这栅栏，像一个永远没有出口的迷宫。
1962.english_text: This fence is like a maze with no exit.

1963.chinese_text: 我常在这里思考，这栅栏是真实存在的，还是我内心深处的映射？
1963.english_text: I often wonder here: is this fence real, or just a reflection of my inner self?

1964.chinese_text: 每当我看着这栅栏，我就感到一种无法言喻的悲伤。
1964.english_text: Whenever I look at this fence, I feel an indescribable sadness.

1965.chinese_text: 这栅栏，像一个永远无法逾越的鸿沟，将我与世界隔绝。
1965.english_text: This fence is like an insurmountable chasm, isolating me from the world.

1966.chinese_text: 我不明白，为什么我要站在这里，看着这栅栏。
1966.english_text: I don't understand why I'm standing here, staring at this fence.

1967.chinese_text: 这栅栏，像一个永远没有答案的谜题。
1967.english_text: This fence is like a riddle that will never have an answer.

1968.chinese_text: 我常在想，如果我能跨过这栅栏，我会看到什么？
1968.english_text: I often think: if I could cross this fence, what would I see?

1969.chinese_text: 这栅栏，像一个永远无法被打破的魔咒。
1969.english_text: This fence is like a curse that can never be broken.

1970.chinese_text: 我站在这里，看着这栅栏，感到一种无法言喻的孤独。
1970.english_text: Standing here, looking at this fence, I feel an unspeakable loneliness.

1971.chinese_text: 这栅栏，像一个永远没有尽头的噩梦。
1971.english_text: This fence is like a nightmare that never ends.

1972.chinese_text: 我常在想，这栅栏是为了保护我，还是为了困住我？
1972.english_text: I often wonder: is this fence here to protect me or to imprison me?

1973.chinese_text: 这栅栏，像一个永远无法被修补的伤口。
1973.english_text: This fence is like a wound that can never be healed.

1974.chinese_text: 我站在这里，看着这栅栏，感到一种无法言喻的绝望。
1974.english_text: Standing here, looking at this fence, I feel an indescribable despair.

1975.chinese_text: 这栅栏，像一个永远没有希望的未来。
1975.english_text: This fence is like a future without any hope.

1976.chinese_text: 我常在想，如果我能摧毁这栅栏，我会得到什么？
1976.english_text: I often wonder: if I could destroy this fence, what would I gain?

1977.chinese_text: 这栅栏，像一个永远无法被遗忘的记忆。
1977.english_text: This fence is like a memory that can never be forgotten.

1978.chinese_text: 我站在这里，看着这栅栏，感到一种无法言喻的痛苦。
1978.english_text: Standing here, looking at this fence, I feel an unspeakable pain.

1979.chinese_text: 这栅栏，像一个永远没有自由的囚笼。
1979.english_text: This fence is like a cage where there is no freedom.

1980.chinese_text: 我站在这里，看着这栅栏，感到一种无法言喻的愤怒。
1980.english_text: Standing here, looking at this fence, I feel an indescribable anger.

1981.chinese_text: 这扇门看起来像是一个限制区域的入口。
1981.english_text: This gate looks like an entrance to a restricted area.

1982.chinese_text: 即使是像素化的，这种设计也足够让人知道这里是禁止通行的。
1982.english_text: Even if it's pixelated, the design makes it clear that entry is forbidden.

1983.chinese_text: 锁孔似乎生锈了，可能很久没被打开过。
1983.english_text: The keyhole seems rusted; it probably hasn't been opened in a long time.

1984.chinese_text: 如果我能从格子的缝隙看过去……
1984.english_text: If only I could peek through the gaps in the mesh...

1985.chinese_text: 门上的连接点看起来很坚固。
1985.english_text: The connection points on the gate look very sturdy.

1986.chinese_text: 这就像是一个不透气的障碍物。
1986.english_text: It feels like an airtight barrier.

1987.chinese_text: 这种风格的铁丝网在这个世界里很常见，通常用来标志边界。
1987.english_text: This style of chain-link is common in this world, usually used to mark boundaries.

1988.chinese_text: 门后面一定藏着什么秘密，对吧？
1988.english_text: There must be a secret hidden behind this gate, right?

1989.chinese_text: 这扇门似乎没有钥匙，可能需要特殊的方法打开。
1989.english_text: This gate doesn't seem to have a key; it might need a special way to open.

1990.chinese_text: 这让我想起了我曾经玩过的一个关于逃脱的游戏。
1990.english_text: This reminds me of an escape game I once played.

1991.chinese_text: 这里的设计师真懂得如何利用最简单的元素制造障碍。
1991.english_text: The designer here really knows how to use simple elements to create obstacles.

1992.chinese_text: 这扇门让我想起了许多关于边界和限制的故事。
1992.english_text: This gate brings to mind many stories about boundaries and limits.

1993.chinese_text: 这可能是某个谜题的一部分，我得好好想想。
1993.english_text: This could be part of a puzzle; I need to give it some thought.

1994.chinese_text: 我能不能试着从这里爬过去？虽然看起来不太可能。
1994.english_text: Can I try to climb over? Although it doesn't look very likely.

1995.chinese_text: 这里的像素艺术风格让这扇门看起来很有趣。
1995.english_text: The pixel art style makes this gate look quite interesting.

1996.chinese_text: 这扇门就像是一个提示，告诉我还有更广阔的世界等着我去探索。
1996.english_text: This gate is like a hint, telling me there's a wider world out there to explore.

1997.chinese_text: 或许我可以用什么东西来撬开它？
1997.english_text: Maybe I could use something to pry it open?

1998.chinese_text: 这让我想起了那些被锁住的记忆和秘密。
1998.english_text: This reminds me of those locked memories and secrets.

1999.chinese_text: 看起来我需要找到另一条路，或者找到一种打开它的方法。
1999.english_text: Looks like I need to find another way, or figure out how to open it.

2000.chinese_text: 门后可能充满了未知的危险，但我准备好了。
2000.english_text: The area behind the gate might be full of unknown dangers, but I'm ready.
